News.title: News Article
News.description: A news article with title, content, category, and metadata.

title.description: Title of the news article in Bengali.

content.description: Full content of the news article in Bengali.

category.description: Category of the news (e.g., রাজনীতি, খেলাধুলা, বিনোদন).

authorUid.description: UID of the admin who created the news.

authorName.description: Name of the admin who created the news.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the news was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the news was last updated.

isPublished.description: Whether the news is visible to the public.
